import { innerFrom } from '../observable/innerFrom'; import { observeOn } from '../operators/observeOn'; import { subscribeOn } from '../operators/subscribeOn'; import { SchedulerLike } from '../types'; export function schedulePromise<T>(input: PromiseLike<T>, scheduler: SchedulerLike) { return innerFrom(input).pipe(subscribeOn(scheduler), observeOn(scheduler)); }
